totals.delta_explanation: Forte 1 hardware constraint: minimum-shots=100 per task. C2 spec called for 50 shots; minimum forced bump to 100, costing extra $4.00 (1 task * $0 task-fee delta + 50 extra shots * $0.08/shot).

estimated_aws_billing_post_settle: Will appear on AWS account 267673635495 invoice for May 2026 under service 'Amazon Braket' line items. Forte 1 line: $24.00 (shots) + $0.90 (tasks) = $24.90.
